title: Paw Patrol: The Mighty Movie Toy Recycling Lorry with Rocky Mighty Pups Action Figure, Lights and Sounds, Kids’ Toys for Boys and Girls 3+
features: MIGHTY PUPS ACTION FIGURE: Dressed in his PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie uniform, this one-of-a-kind Rocky toy figure is a must-have, featuring translucent parts that light up when he’s in his vehicle
PAW PATROL MOVIE VEHICLE: Designed with authentic details and styling, Rocky’s recycling lorry looks just like the exciting PAW Patrol toy trucks that you know from the Mighty Movie
LIGHTS AND SOUND EFFECTS: Activate the synchronised lights and sounds in Rocky’s vehicle by clipping him into the seat of his awesome toy recycling lorry, before racing off on a rescue mission
COLLECT THEM ALL: Expand your collection of PAW Patrol toys for girls and boys with toy trucks, action figures, diecast cars, dinosaur toys, stuffed animals, board games, jigsaw puzzles and more

EDUCATIONAL AND LEARNING TOYS: PAW Patrol preschool toys and toddler toys are great gifts for kids who like pretend play with toy cars, toy figures and playsets as an alternative to dolls or a train set
description: From the brand Paw Patrol Join the brave puppies on their adventures!
